title: Style Register
description: Per-component style validation with CRITIQUE PROOF via Step 14 critique (nav-component-critique steps A–G). status=validated ONLY when lastSimilarity >= 95 AND critiqueReportPath points to an existing file AND critiqueIterations >= 1 AND screenshotSourcePath and screenshotMigratedPath point to actual PNG files. Self-assessed scores are NOT accepted — screenshots must be captured and compared.

id.description: Unique ID. Examples: row-0-logo, row-0-cta, megamenu-trigger-0-products, megamenu-trigger-0-item-0-widget-x, megamenu-trigger-0-featured, megamenu-trigger-0-tab-category-a

label.description: Human-readable label (e.g. 'Logo', 'Offers CTA', 'Products megamenu panel', 'Widget X image-card')

status.description: validated = critiqued and >= 95%; skipped = not critiqued (optional full critique later); pending = not yet processed

lastSimilarity.description: From inline critique comparison (NOT self-assessed). Must be >= 95 to validate.

critiqueReportPath.description: REQUIRED. Path to critique-report.json from critique step E. Must exist on disk. Empty = not validated.

critiqueIterations.description: REQUIRED. Times the inline critique ran for this component. Must be >= 1 for validated.

screenshotSourcePath.description: REQUIRED. Path to source component screenshot (PNG) from critique step C. Must exist on disk.

screenshotMigratedPath.description: REQUIRED. Path to migrated component screenshot (PNG) from critique step D. Must exist on disk.

sourceSelector.description: CSS/xpath selector used to isolate this component on the source page (critique step A)

migratedSelector.description: CSS/xpath selector used to isolate this component on the migrated page (critique step A)

interactionRequired.description: If component needed interaction before capture (critique step B): e.g. 'hover nav-trigger-0 to open panel', 'click SUV tab'

allValidated.description: true when the 4 key components (key-critique-top-bar-desktop, key-critique-nav-links-row-desktop, key-critique-mobile-header-bar, key-critique-mobile-menu-root-panel) are validated with full critique proof; other components may be status 'skipped'. Hooks block until all 4 key are validated and no component remains 'pending'.
